Mars conjunct Mercury his enemy, meets Venus his enemy in the next
house and later another enemy Saturn. This indicates the marriage to be
delayed. It may come off about 30.
The native will serve in an educational institution, as Saturn contacts
the Moon in Aquarius and later Jupiter in Pisces.
The' health of the native will not be good.
